$schema-note: Pinned pre-existing pgTAP reds tolerated by scripts/run-pgtap.ts. A CI run passes iff EXACTLY these files fail, each with AT MOST its maxFailures failing assertions; any OTHER red fails the check, a listed file that exceeds maxFailures fails the check (a NEW regression inside a quarantined file is surfaced, not masked), and a listed file that starts passing is surfaced for removal. Residual: a regression that keeps the SAME failing-assertion count in a listed file is still tolerated — keep this list minimal and fix+delete entries. Match on the exact readdir basename under supabase/tests/database/. See ADR 0081.

files.reason: Asserts an exact seeded category count (13 enum + 1 user category, spec 239 fasteners). The live catalog has drifted past the seed, so 1 count assertion fails against real data. Fix = assert on the seeded rows only, not a global count (follow-up), then remove this entry.
